# Support

## Getting Help

Use GitHub Issues for:

- bug reports
- feature requests
- documentation gaps
- operational questions about the supported workflows in this repository

When opening an issue, include:

- which entrypoint you ran
- OS and Python version when relevant
- whether you used Docker or native Ubuntu
- the exact command and the relevant output

## Security Issues

Do not use public issues for undisclosed vulnerabilities.

Use the private vulnerability reporting flow described in [`SECURITY.md`](SECURITY.md).
